name: Restaurant Brands International Limited Partnership
business: Restaurant Brands International is a quick service restaurant company owning and franchising four iconic brands: Tim Hortons, Burger King, Popeyes, and Firehouse Subs. It operates over 33,000 restaurants in more than 120 countries, with over 95% franchised. The company generates revenue primarily through royalties, franchise fees, and supply chain operations.

exposures.sentence: We are one of the world's largest quick service restaurant (QSR) companies with nearly $47 billion in annual system-wide sales and over 33,000 restaurants in more than 120 countries and territories as of December 31, 2025.

catalysts.event: Joint venture with CPE for Burger King China closed
catalysts.sentence: On January 30, 2026, we closed our previously announced joint venture with CPE Alder Investment Limited, a fund managed by CPE (CPE), with respect to the operations of Burger King China (such joint venture, the Burger King China JV).
